We had a fantastic tour of the Golden Gate Bridge and Sausalito. Chance was an excellent guide, very knowledgeable, friendly, and patient throughout the day. We enjoyed plenty of great stops along the way and never felt rushed. The pace was perfect, allowing us to take in the sights and learn about the area. I would highly recommend this tour to anyone visiting San Francisco.
